description: MaR - Matcher and Replacer, Perform intelligent replacement based on precise matching. A BurpSuite plugin for HTTP packet modification.
notes: MaR is developed using the Montoya API. You need BurpSuite version (>=2023.12.1) to use it.
Plugin Installation: Extender - Extensions - Add - Select File - Next
When you load MaR for the first time, it will automatically create the configuration file Config.yml and rules file Rules.yml.
